headline: Does Lululemon (LULU) Activism And ShowZero Launch Reveal A Deeper Brand Strategy Debate?
summary: Earlier this month, Lululemon founder Chip Wilson escalated his activist campaign by launching a website outlining extensive board changes and promoting three independent director nominees, while the company simultaneously introduced its first ShowZero sweat-concealing technology co-developed with tennis ambassador Frances Tiafoe for high-sweat performance apparel. This combination of boardroom pressure and visible product innovation highlights a tension between questions over governance and...
